title: DelegationRevocation (v1)
description: Signed, offline-verifiable revocation of a StandingDelegation. Only the grant's delegator may sign one. The canonical source of truth for grant revocation. See spec/standing-delegation-v1.md.

delegator_id.description: Delegator's motebit identity. MUST equal the grant's delegator.

delegator_public_key.description: Delegator's Ed25519 public key, hex-encoded (64 lowercase). Verifies `signature`. To bind a grant, MUST equal that grant's `delegator_public_key`.

revoked_at.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the grant was revoked.

suite.description: Cryptosuite identifier. Always `motebit-jcs-ed25519-b64-v1`: JCS (RFC 8785), Ed25519, base64url signature, hex public keys.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over `canonicalJson(body)` (this object minus `signature`). Verify with `delegator_public_key`.
